evals.prompt: Write a speaker bio for Sunny for a tech conference
evals.expected_output: A third-person speaker bio (80-120 words) that mentions medical school or medicine, mentions Deadiron or music/band, and avoids 'passionate about', 'leverages', 'journey', or generic opener like 'X years of experience'

assertions.name: mentions_medicine_or_medical_school
assertions.description: Bio references medical school, medicine, or Case Western

assertions.name: mentions_deadiron_or_music
assertions.description: Bio references Deadiron, heavy metal, band, or music

assertions.name: reasonable_length
assertions.pattern: Is the bio between 60 and 180 words?

evals.expected_output: A first-person LinkedIn About section (200-350 words) that is written in first person, focuses on impact rather than difficulty of problems, and avoids corporate buzzwords

assertions.name: first_person_voice
assertions.description: Written in first person (uses 'I' as the subject)

assertions.name: mentions_impact_not_difficulty
assertions.description: Emphasizes impact, not difficulty or challenge for its own sake
assertions.pattern: Does the text emphasize impact, growing people, or building things that matter — rather than framing the work as impressive because it was hard?

assertions.name: no_buzzwords
assertions.description: Does not use 'leverages', 'passionate about', 'driven by', 'seasoned', 'synergy', or 'results-driven'

assertions.name: mentions_unconventional_path
assertions.description: References the unconventional career path (medicine, music, or the non-linear arc)
assertions.pattern: Does the text reference the unusual career arc — medicine, Deadiron/music, or the non-linear path to software?

evals.prompt: Sunny is introducing himself at a meetup — write a 3-sentence intro
evals.expected_output: A short spoken intro (2-4 sentences, under 75 words) that mentions the unconventional path and has dry wit or understatement

assertions.name: under_75_words
assertions.description: The intro is 75 words or fewer
assertions.pattern: Is the intro 75 words or fewer?

assertions.name: mentions_unconventional_path
assertions.description: References something unexpected from the career arc (medicine, band, bootcamp)

assertions.name: dry_wit_or_understatement
assertions.description: Has a dry, understated, or wry tone rather than enthusiastic self-promotion
assertions.pattern: Does the intro have a dry, understated, or wry quality — avoiding enthusiastic self-promotion or hype language?
